findings: launch_proof_required defaults to False if missing — warning suppressed when field absent
warning only checks squads==0, not workers==0; 50 squads/0 workers silently passes
incomplete-proof warning only fires on status==success, not status==partial
monitor reads swarm-state.json only; child-agents.jsonl not directly read by monitor
workers_started and workers_launched can diverge silently — only telemetry fallback to proof
orphan recovery 180s threshold may be too aggressive for slow heartbeats
print_collab_summary is safe when collab/ dir absent — returns 0 counts
